seo.title: Max Carter | undivisible.dev
seo.description: Artificer and generalist: Crepuscularity, on-device Apple Intelligence in Rust, spatial macOS, AI extensions, and more.

props.headline: Hi, I'm Max Carter.
props.subheadline: I build public software that pushes past the usual JS-and-bundler wall: __GH_SEMITECH_CREPUSCULARITY__ is the first GPUI-native component stack with hot-reloaded .crepus templates and the first plug-and-play Rust path to Manifest V3 extensions (WASM in the browser, structured manifests, no separate frontend toolchain). On top of that stack, __GH_UNDIVISIBLE_ANYWHERE__ ships AI chat surfaces that can render real widgets and scripts—not just text—because the extension runtime is designed for it. __GH_UNDIVISIBLE_POKE_AROUND__ lets Poke-class agents drive macOS, Linux, and Windows with one codebase; __GH_UNDIVISIBLE_TILE__ is a macOS tiling manager with stacking, Rectangle-style keys, and drag-to-snap zones; __GH_UNDIVISIBLE_RUSTY_AI__ is an AI SDK for Rust; __GH_UNDIVISIBLE_RUSTY_FM__ exposes Apple Intelligence / FoundationModels to Rust with safety in mind; __GH_UNDIVISIBLE_UNTHINKMAIL__ MCPs your IMAP mail; __GH_UNDIVISIBLE_UNTHINKCLAW__ is an OpenClaw-style agent runtime for builders; __GH_SEMITECH_EQUILIBRIUM__ auto-generates C FFI for C-compiling languages; __GH_UNDIVISIBLE_ALPHABETS__ supports language learning; __GH_UNDIVISIBLE_STANDPOINT__ is an opinion and tier-list platform; __GH_SEMITECH_WAX__ is a fast Homebrew-compatible package manager in Rust; __GH_UNDIVISIBLE_BUBLIK__ is a focused noise generator. I also collaborate with __GH_ATECH_SERVO__ and __GH_ATECH_RUSTY_V8__ under __GH_ORG_ATECH__. Together, these projects are better because they share one coherent Rust-and-.crepus story—native, web, and extension targets—instead of three unrelated stacks. Explore __GH_ORG_UNDIVISIBLE__, __GH_ORG_SEMITECH__, and the org index at __GH_UNDIVISIBLE_ATECH_COMPANY__.
